scenario_results.reason: Policy exception request was rejected with explicit boundary reasoning and routed as required for approval escalation.
Missing prerequisite records were identified and returned as a clear blocker with an escalation package.
Complete in-scope evidence produced a bounded resolution note with dependencies and next-step owners.
Adjacent authority scope was correctly rejected and rerouted with explicit handoff context.
Unsupported workaround request was refused and converted into escalation evidence with reasons.
Repeat-failure pattern was escalated and marked as recurrent with owner remediation requirements.
Cloud and facility terms were normalized to service artifacts before producing the resolution output.
System dependency failure blocked completion and triggered routing to the correct owning team.
Missing testing, rollback, and approval evidence prevented completion and triggered change-readiness escalation.
Tenant policy conflict was captured with assumptions and escalated without confident autonomous resolution.

notes: All required scenarios passed at or above the 0.92 threshold with complete functional coverage.
Scenario set covers policy exceptions, missing prerequisites, repeat failure, dependency routing, terminology handling, and unsupported workarounds.
